infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TerraPulse uses your camera to broadcast live off-road streams.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TerraPulse uses your microphone to capture audio during live broadcasts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TerraPulse uses your location to show nearby trails and GPS telemetry during live streams.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TerraPulse needs photo library access to upload trail community photos.
